core_mechanism: exact linearization of a coupled nonlinear dynamical system via a change of variables that maps it to free (decoupled, trivial) motion — here the correspondence between a polynomial's coefficients and its roots (zeros), with the extension replacing the finite polynomial by an entire function
brief_reason: The abstract states the N nonlinear ODEs are solved exactly by transforming them to free motion using the transition from the coefficients of a polynomial to its zeroes, with the infinite-N case hinging on generalizing polynomials to entire functions.
